commands.name: evaluate
commands.description: Evaluate a pull request against configured rules and optionally approve it.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to the MergeButler YAML configuration file. [default: mergebutler.yaml]

options.name: --pr
options.description: URL of the pull request to evaluate.

options.name: --platform
options.description: The platform hosting the pull request.

options.name: --token
options.description: Authentication token for the platform API. Defaults to GITHUB_TOKEN or AZURE_DEVOPS_TOKEN environment variable.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Evaluate the pull request without submitting an approval. [default: False]

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Start the MergeButler MCP server for local development (stdio transport).

commands.name: config
commands.description: View or modify MergeButler configuration (exclusions and rules).

commands.name: show
commands.description: Display the effective merged configuration and where each item comes from.

commands.name: set-exclusion
commands.description: Add or update an exclusion pattern.

options.name: --target
options.description: What the pattern matches against. [default: Both]

options.name: --scope
options.description: Where to save: user-level or repo-level. [default: Repo]

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: The exclusion pattern to add or update.

options.name: --patterns
options.description: File glob patterns (for fileGlob rules). Specify multiple: --patterns *.md --patterns docs/**

options.name: --scope
options.description: Where to save: user-level or repo-level. [default: Repo]

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The rule name (used as unique identifier).

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Set up mergiraf, configure Git for structural merging, and install the resolve-conflicts Copilot skill.

options.name: --yes
options.description: Skip all prompts and perform every setup step automatically. [default: False]
